problem_statement: Given a matrix if an element in the matrix is 0 then you will have to set its entire column and row to 0 and then return the matrix..

examples.explanation: Since matrix[2][2]=0.Therfore the 2nd column and 2nd row wil be set to 0.
Since matrix[0][0]=0 and matrix[0][3]=0. Therefore 1st row, 1st column and 4th column will be set to 0
